title: Ethnicity and educational attainment
summary: 9699 — ethnic differences in achievement, racism, and cultural factors in education.
learningObjectives: Describe patterns of achievement by ethnic group.
Explain material and cultural factors for ethnic minorities.
Analyse institutional racism and teacher labelling.
Evaluate policy responses to ethnic inequality.

simpleExplanation.title: Ethnicity and exam results
simpleExplanation.summary: Achievement varies widely by ethnic group — material disadvantage, family culture, and racism in schools all play a part.
steps: Patterns — e.g. Chinese/Indian high; some groups lower.
Racism — Gillborn, Wright, Mac an Ghaill.

sections.content: **Ethnicity and attainment** (6.3) needs **nuanced statistics** — avoid stereotypes; explain **within-group variation**.
